title: RAF Lossiemouth: Locals evacuated and roads closed as 'suspicious package' discovered at military base

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
RAF Lossiemouth: Locals evacuated and roads closed as 'suspicious package' discovered at military base.

The package has been removed.
